notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the bind9.16 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 13 CVEs: CVE-2021-25220, CVE-2022-2795, CVE-2022-3094, CVE-2022-3736, CVE-2022-3924, and 8 more.
